seo.title: Nova Scotia Web Designer — Meet Evan Hatt | Hatt Digital
seo.description: Hatt Digital is a one-person web studio in Nova Scotia run by Evan Hatt — honest pricing, clean design, and websites that help local customers contact you.

hero.heading: Your neighbour, not an agency.
hero.lead: Hatt Digital is a one-person website studio in Nova Scotia built on a simple idea: honest websites, fair prices, and real support.

founder.quote: I started Hatt Digital because too many local businesses get sold expensive, complicated websites they don’t actually need. I wanted to build the opposite: honest pricing, clean design, and websites that make it easier for customers to find you, trust you, and contact you.

difference.heading: Why working with me is different.
difference.intro: When you work with Hatt Digital, you deal directly with the person building your website. No handoffs, no account managers, and no getting ignored after launch.

cards.title: You deal directly with me
cards.text: The same person who learns about your business builds the site, makes the changes, and stays reachable after it goes live.

cards.title: No bloated agency process
cards.text: No confusing packages, long delays, or monthly fees you do not understand. Just a clear plan, steady progress, and a website built around what your business actually needs.

cards.title: Clear pricing before work starts
cards.text: You see a flat, all-in number before anything begins. The price we agree on is the price you pay.

cards.title: Simple handoff and support after launch
cards.text: I show you how everything works, and I’m still here when you need a change down the road.

local.heading: Built here, for here.
local.body1: I’m based right here in Nova Scotia, and I understand small businesses around here because they’re my community too. When you call, you reach the person who actually built your site, not a ticket number or an offshore queue.
local.body2: I work with contractors, trades, and service businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, the South Shore and beyond. That means honest advice, quick answers, and someone genuinely invested in your business doing well.

cta.heading: Ready to work with the person who will actually build your website?
cta.body: Send me your current site, your business idea, or what you need built. I’ll take a look and tell you the best next step for free.
